use_codes.desc: TINEA PEDIS, TINEA CRURIS, TINEA CORPORIS

indications.text:
LamisilÒ (terbinafine) DermGelÔ, 1%, is indicated for the topical treatment of the following
dermatologic infections: tinea (pityriasis) versicolor due to Malassezia furfur (formerly
Pityrosporum ovale), tinea pedis (athlete’s foot), tinea corporis (ringworm) or tinea cruris
(jock itch) due to Trich...
